title: bauhinia finlaysoniana
intro: Bauhinia finlaysoniana, also known as the Finlayson's orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Bauhinia finlaysoniana include decoctions and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the roots or flowers in hot water to extract its active compounds.
